title: Wireframe — Landing Page
description: Complete landing page template combining header, hero, features, testimonials, CTA, newsletter, and footer.

customization_guide.hero_image: Replace with your product image (1200×600px minimum, WebP recommended)
customization_guide.hero_headline: Update to your value proposition (60–80 characters)
customization_guide.hero_cta: Change button text and link destination
customization_guide.testimonials: Add 3–5 real customer testimonials with avatars
customization_guide.newsletter_form: Connect to your email service provider
customization_guide.footer_links: Update company info, legal links, social URLs

notes: This wireframe combines 7 pre-built sections into a high-converting landing page. All sections use Nordover tokens for consistent branding. Modify text, images, and form actions without touching CSS.
